context.constraint: $0-first, self-hosted Contabo, NO mock, NO fabricated precision
context.core_rule: Every number tagged [FACT] or [EST faixa]. Scrape/parse = FACT. Modeled multiplier = ESTIMATE-with-range. Invented = FORBIDDEN.
guardrails: Playwright/Patchright + browser binaries run ONLY on the VM, NEVER the PC
Ollama writes PT-BR prose ONLY, never generates facts/numbers
Throttle all scrapers; VM-only; expect breakage every 2-4 weeks

feasibility_legend.solid-free: genuinely $0, unlimited or generous, low risk
feasibility_legend.proxy-only: no direct $0 source, use observable proxies

dimensions.name: presence-social-ads
dimensions.primary_tool: Meta Ad Library (public web) + Google Ads Transparency Center
facts: ad start date + active status + platforms
FB page created date + name changes
estimates: posting cadence (visible ~12 posts window, as range)
forbidden: exact commercial ad spend in R$
inferring an ad exists when library returned nothing

tools.name: Meta Ad Library
tools.note: Playwright GraphQL interception on VM; NOT official API (BR commercial=political-only, no creative downloads)

tools.name: faniAhmed/GoogleAdsTransparencyScraper
tools.risk: scrape-risk, Jul-2023 release may need patch

tools.name: Instagram public profile fetch
tools.risk: scrape-risk, breaks every 2-4wk, datacenter IP blocked

dimensions.name: seo-position
dimensions.primary_tool: Lighthouse CLI (tech, unlimited) + Serper free then self-host scraper (rank)
forbidden: implying one rank observation is a stable average

tools.name: Google Keyword Planner / Keyword Surfer
tools.free: free w/ Ads acct / free ext

dimensions.name: competitive-analysis
dimensions.primary_tool: Overpass + Google Maps (set) + Meta/Google ad-presence + PageSpeed
facts: rating, review_count, photo_count, GBP claimed, hours, has_website

tools.name: Google Maps (Playwright)
tools.risk: scrape-risk, warm session, VM not PC

dimensions.name: keyword-volume
dimensions.answer: EXACT $0 volume IS achievable: DataForSEO $1 free credit (no card) = ~20 requests x 1000 kw = up to 20,000 keywords FREE as EXACT integers, location_name=Brazil language=pt. Official Google Ads API is free but returns RANGES on no-spend accounts; exact needs ~$5-10/day spend. ALL volumes are modeled (+/-20-40%).
outputs: exact monthly volume + 12mo trend + CPC + competition per keyword, cached in Postgres
facts: Keyword Surfer exact volume in SERP (manual)
estimates: Google Ads API buckets on no-spend acct
forbidden: inventing a number for a no-data term

tools.name: DataForSEO Google Ads Search Volume API
tools.free: $1 signup credit no card (~20k kw), then $0.05/request 1000kw, $50 min top-up

tools.name: Google Ads API (KeywordPlanIdeaService)
tools.free: free 15k ops/day but RANGES unless ad spend

tools.name: searchvolume.io / kwresearch.io
tools.free: free web UI, ToS limits automation

dimensions.name: adwords-competition
dimensions.primary_tool: Google Keyword Planner (geo Cuiaba, Expert Mode, skip campaign = $0)
outputs: per-keyword table: CPC range BRL | competition L/M/H | #SERP ad slots | named advertisers | ad longevity
facts: CPC top-of-page bid range BRL geo-Cuiaba (official Google)
who advertises now + ad longevity (Transparency + Meta)
forbidden: exact # of advertisers (Google gives only L/M/H)

tools.name: Google Keyword Planner
tools.free: free, skip campaign never activate = $0, account-needed

dimensions.name: organic-strategy
dimensions.primary_tool: Google Places Details (10k/mo free) + PageSpeed + on-disk scorers reweighted Whitespark 2026
outputs: 0-100 score + letter grade + component bars + P0-P3 actions
GMB checklist + reviews engine + on-page + cadence + citations
facts: schema present / NAP match / H1 / title
estimates: projected leads = views x benchmark conversion band x ticket

tools.name: Google Places API (Place Details)
tools.free: free 10k Essentials events/mo (~300 audits); account+billing card on file
tools.note: field-mask to stay in Essentials SKU; cache in SQLite

dimensions.name: revenue-data-pricing
estimates: monthly demand: reviews ~1-3% of transactions -> LOW(reviews/0.03)-HIGH(reviews/0.01)
capacity ceiling from popular_times x hours x served/hr
forbidden: per-item prices inferred without source or stated niche-median

tools.name: iFood __NEXT_DATA__ extraction
tools.risk: scrape-risk, ToS gray, rate-limit + rotate UA

dimensions.name: revenue-projection-method
dimensions.formula: Monthly_uplift = Demand x Capture x Conversion x Ticket x Close
dimensions.confidence: MEDIUM — HIGH that the range is defensible, LOW that any single point is 'the' number; never present a point

factors.demand: sum monthly volume top 10-20 local kw (Cuiaba ~660k pop -> SMALL volumes, tens-hundreds/mo)
factors.capture: incremental CTR delta current->target. Organic FirstPageSage 2024-26: p1=39.8 p2=18.7 p3=10.2 p4=7.2 p5=5.1 p7=3.0 p10=1.6. Ads: p1=7.94 p2=4.55 p3=2.55 (avg 3.17)
factors.conversion: BR Neotrust/Ebit 2024: ecommerce 1.65, alimentacao 3.8, saude 3.2, beleza 2.9, moda 1.9, servicos 4.02; mobile 1.2 vs desktop 2.8; local near-me 28% -> purchase
factors.ticket: business OWN avg ticket — ASK, never guess

scenarios: conservative (low volume, pos8->4, low conv, worst ticket, low close)
likely (midpoint, pos8->3, median conv, avg ticket)
optimistic (high volume, pos1-2, top-quartile conv, peak ticket)
dimensions.output_format: R$ X - R$ Y - R$ Z /mo with EVERY multiplier visible and cited
data_pipeline: CTR/conversion: hardcoded cited BR benchmark tables

account_needed: Google Places (billing card on file even at $0)

open_decisions: Spend DataForSEO $1 free credit now to prove EXACT-volume pipeline, then $50 top-up?
Accept Places API billing card on file (stays $0) vs pure gosom scrape (no card, ToS-gray)?
Lead with FOOD niche (best price+demand coverage)? Which verticals first Geronimo vs Vuecra?
Build per-niche ticket+close table from owner knowledge now (required for projection)?
Accept scraper maintenance every 2-4 weeks (DOM/doc_id rotation)?
